scripts.test: pip install -r requirements.txt >/dev/null && node tests/conversation-utils.test.js && node tests/crep-phase-matrix.test.js && node tests/search-conversations.test.js && node tests/conversation-stats.test.js && node tests/readme-generator.test.js
scripts.docs:build: npm run summarize && node scripts/generate-readme.js && echo "build docs"
